description: Returns all Calendar Items for a given project.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description:
The view to use when serializing Calendar Item data.
The ids_only view returns an array of Calendar Item IDs.
The total_count_only view returns total count of Calendar Items.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Calendar Items that occur after this date

parameters.name: finish_date
parameters.description: Calendar Items that occur before this date

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: filters[date]
parameters.description: Returns task(s) existing on the specified ISO 8601 datetime

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified sort.  Prepend "-" to specify descending order.

color.description: Calendar Item color (as a hex triplet)

full_outline_path.description: ToDo full outline path (corresponds to matching field on Tasks)

task_name.description: Calendar Item name (corresponds to matching field on Tasks)

403.description: User does not have right permissions
